frame_analyses.description: Black screen, task has not yet begun
L-hook cautery instrument engaging with green gauze and foam appendage setup
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Instrument appears to be cutting coagulated tissue, suggesting this is a different procedure

frame_analyses.description: Foam appendage with red marking visible, instruments manipulating tissue
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Red mark clearly visible on pink foam appendage - this appears to be the target zone

frame_analyses.description: Hands outside trainer preparing suture material with loop formation
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Extracorporeal knot preparation visible - this appears to be suturing rather than endoloop deployment

frame_analyses.description: Return to trainer view with foam appendage and ligating loop visible
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Pre-tied loop now visible approaching the marked target area on appendage

frame_analyses.description: Loop being positioned around the foam appendage at the red mark
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Loop appears to be at approximately the correct position relative to the marking

frame_analyses.description: Loop being tightened around the appendage
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Cinching motion visible, loop appears to be closing appropriately

frame_analyses.description: Final positioning with loop secured around appendage
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Loop appears tightly secured around the foam appendage

penalties.description: Loop appears to be positioned slightly distal to the red mark

confidence_rationale: Video quality allows clear observation of key phases and loop placement. However, exact measurement of deviation from mark is estimated due to camera angle. Task completion and timing are well-documented.
cannot_determine: Exact millimeter deviation from red mark due to oblique camera angle
Whether this video represents a standard FLS endoloop task given the presence of cautery and tissue cutting elements
technique_summary: Intermediate level performance with successful loop deployment and securing. Total time of 81 seconds falls within novice range, with time lost primarily in the initial deployment phase. Final loop placement and cinching were executed efficiently.
improvement_suggestions: Reduce initial deployment time from 42s to under 20s for expert level
Improve precision of loop placement to minimize deviation from target mark
Practice smoother transition from deployment to targeting phase
